# Pull Request

## Summary

**What changed and why?**
- EN: [Describe the change]
- TH: [อธิบายการเปลี่ยนแปลง]

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Fix (bug fix)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs (documentation only)
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Performance improvement

---

## Pre-Merge Checklist

### Code & Logic
- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] No breaking changes (or clearly documented)

### Testing
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Edge cases considered

### Documentation
- [ ] Public APIs documented (functions, endpoints, components)
- [ ] Required doc fields included:
  - [ ] Description (what + why)
  - [ ] Parameters with types
  - [ ] Return value
  - [ ] Side effects (if any)
  - [ ] Example usage
- [ ] README/docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] No breaking changes in docs

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code readable without reading implementation
- [ ] Naming is semantic (no temp/data/input abuse)
- [ ] Functions follow single-responsibility principle

### Security & Cost
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No unexpected cost increase (AI/API calls)
- [ ] AI output validated (mock or real)

### Files & Structure
- [ ] Files moved/renamed are documented in commit
- [ ] Dependencies changed clearly noted

---

## Related Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

---

## Notes (Optional)

- Migration notes, breaking changes, or dependency updates
